text:
Meet Pennywise.

One autumn night.

A gentle breeze carries whispers from somewhere dark.

She follows.

In a garden dim.

A voice.

Soft.

She follows.

In a tree.

Bigger than her.

Dark thoughts.

But she likes them anyway.

A scream.

She runs.

But it's gone.

Next week.

Her owner finds bones.

Not far.

Dead.

She hides.

They find another.

Hours.

Until she runs.

Outside.

Past dark.

Into fog.

She hears it.

A laugh.

Heart stops.

She hides.

She sleeps.
